hero.desc: Global Leader in UV & MIR Optical Systems. Providing high-performance drying and curing solutions for next-gen manufacturing.

About.ceoMessage: We don't just sell equipment; we provide the precision needed to advance human industry. Efficiency, accuracy, and innovation are the pillars of Lichtzen's optical expertise.

timeline.2010: Lichtzen Established (Specializing in UV/IR Optical Systems)
timeline.2016: Establishment of Corporate R&D Center (Optical Physics Lab)
timeline.2019: Development of High-Efficiency MIR Drying System for EV Batteries
timeline.2022: Global Export Expansion (Exceeding $10M in Annual Revenue)
timeline.2024: Next-Gen Intelligent UV Curing Platform Launch

values.precision: Nano-scale accuracy in light distribution control.
values.sustainability: Eco-friendly curing with minimal energy consumption.
values.innovation: Leading the future of display and battery manufacturing.

Applications.title: Industrial Applications
Applications.desc: Leading optical solutions for the world's most demanding manufacturing processes.

battery.name: Secondary Battery
battery.title: Electrode Drying Solution
battery.desc: Our MIR system provides deep-penetration drying for thick electrodes, increasing production speed by 40% and reducing energy costs.

oled.name: OLED / Display
oled.title: Precision UV Sealing
oled.desc: Ensuring zero organic degradation with ultra-narrow wave control and precision cooling systems for OLED encapsulation.

list.title: Product Lineup
list.desc: Lichtzen's precision optical solutions breaking the limits of UV curing and MIR drying processes.

ls4.title: Spot UV LED (LS4)
ls4.desc: Precision curing system for high-end camera modules and sensor assembly.

lba.title: Area UV LED (LBA)
lba.desc: Uniform irradiation system for large-area displays and surface treatment.

conveyor.title: UV Conveyor System
conveyor.desc: Continuous process curing system for automated production lines.

uvRoll.title: UV Roll-to-Roll
uvRoll.desc: High-speed system optimized for film and continuous substrate processes.

mirSystem.title: MIR Drying System
mirSystem.desc: Mid-infrared solution for deep drying of EV battery electrodes.

radiometer.title: UV Radiometer
radiometer.desc: Precision measurement for UV intensity and accumulated dose.

components.title: Components & Others
